WHAT I BUILT

PROJECT_01 · DEC 2025
INTELLIGENT DOC CHATBOT
Retrieval-Augmented Generation System
  • Built RAG pipeline to query PDF documents with natural language.
  • FAISS vector similarity search over embedded document chunks.
  • Google Gemini API for context-aware response generation.
  • Automated parse → embed → retrieve → answer pipeline.
PythonGemini APIFAISSRAGNLP
What does the doc say about FAISS?
FAISS enables efficient vector similarity search. The document indexes all chunks as embeddings…
Summarise the methods section
The paper uses a 3-stage pipeline: chunking, embedding with sentence-transformers, then top-k retrieval…
